lines.speaker: Captain Tock
lines.text: Arrr, 'tis the young [lad/lass] who helped save my crew from that scoundrel, Ithoi! How be ye this fine day?

lines.speaker: Captain Tock
lines.text: Arrr, ye looks fine. Stiff in the spine, firm in the mind an' long in the leg. 'Tis good to see ye again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is there to do here?

lines.speaker: Captain Tock
lines.text: Well, ye could maybe explore the ogre caves. Arsen says the ogres be fearsome, though, so watch yer step. An' there be places for ye to train yer skills, over to the west.
